name: Maria Santos
quote: My 8-year-old was nervous at first, but Coach Edmar made him feel welcome. His dribbling and confidence improved in just a month!

name: James Dela Cruz
quote: The 1-on-1 sessions changed my shooting form completely. I finally understand footwork and how to read defenders.

name: Patricia Lim
quote: Group training is worth it — jersey included and the kids love their teammates. Great value for monthly sessions.
